title: Triangle Angle
text: We solved for the $$x$$ and $$y$$ components for the final vector R, now we just need to apply arctan. Note the $$y-component$$ is negative (south of east).

title: Apply Arctan Function
text: The resultant has $$x$$ component about $$32.14$$ (east) and $$y$$ component about $$-8.57$$ (south). The compass bearing from north (clockwise) is $$90+\arctan\left(\frac{8.57}{32.14}\right)$$. What is this value?
